headlines.title: How three major candidates for governor are talking about their Biden administration experience
headlines.description: A trio of former Biden White House officials running for governor in 2026 are striking a delicate balance, pointing to their experience in the administration without leaning too aggressively into their connection to a former president still facing a raft of bad headlines

headlines.title: Trump defrosts relations with Europe’s last dictator Alexander Lukashenko
headlines.description: The man known as Europe’s last dictator may soon be coming in from the cold, as President Donald Trump helps him emerge from years of isolation

headlines.title: Lead federal prosecutor in James Comey seashells photo case steps aside
headlines.description: Federal prosecutor in seashells case against FBI Director James Comey has resigned.

headlines.title: Four more men rescued from flooded cave after becoming trapped while searching for gold
headlines.description: Five men have been freed after spending more than a week trapped in a flooded cave in Laos, according to rescuers, with two others still missing

headlines.title: A CIA officer’s alleged heist, and a buffalo’s uncanny likeness to a famous American: The news quiz
headlines.description: Another incumbent is defeated in a primary, the pope releases his first encyclical, and the New York Knicks turn back the clock.

headlines.title: ICE eyes selling mega-warehouses purchased for mass detention
headlines.description: WASHINGTON — The Trump administration is looking into selling some of the large warehouses that Immigration and Customs Enforcement had purchased earlier this year to serve as mega-detention centers for immigrants, according to two Department of Homeland Security officials

headlines.title: One birthday, two party planners: Freedom 250 vs. America250, explained
headlines.description: Learn more about how the America250 and Freedom 250 events differ as artists, including Martina McBride, Young MC and The Commodores, back out of Trump concert.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.
